Preference.android:title: Always-on sanitized log
Preference.android:summary: Hostnames and usernames are anonymised before writing. Safe to share with support. Errors are included automatically — no separate error log needed.

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Enable Debug Logging
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Full verbose log including real hostnames/usernames. Developer use only — disable when done.

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Log raw keystroke bytes (privacy risk)
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Off: only `Sent N bytes to SSH` is logged. On: also dumps the first 16 bytes of every keystroke — including sudo/ssh passwords typed at remote prompts. Useful for debugging protocol-level disconnects only.

Preference.android:title: Test crash dialog
Preference.android:summary: Throw a RuntimeException to verify crash reporting (debug only)

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Enable Host Logs
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Record connect, auth, disconnect, and error events per SSH session. Files stay on this device — never sent anywhere unless you export manually.

Preference.android:title: One log file per connection
Preference.android:summary: Each connection profile gets its own log file. Share via View Host Logs → export.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Max Size per Host (MB)
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Rotate after this size. One backup copy kept.

Preference.android:title: View Application Log
Preference.android:summary: Sanitized log — info, warnings, and errors

Preference.android:title: View Debug Log
Preference.android:summary: Full verbose log (only available when debug logging is on)

Preference.android:title: View Audit Log
Preference.android:summary: Security events — auth, commands, file transfers (requires audit logging enabled)

Preference.android:title: Export Logs
Preference.android:summary: Save app log and host logs to a ZIP for sharing

Preference.android:title: Clear Logs
Preference.android:summary: Delete app log and all host log files (cannot be undone)

ListPreference.android:title: Paste Service
ListPreference.android:summary: Service used to upload logs when reporting issues

EditTextPreference.android:title: Pastebin API Key
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Required only when paste service is set to pastebin.com
